sourcePrompt: A traditional Vietnamese village hut of the Mekong Delta, a single small room about four meters wide, raised a hand's height off the ground on short wooden posts. Woven bamboo-mat walls under a steep thatched palm-leaf roof whose eaves overhang deeply, a single doorway with a woven door leaf, and one small window opening. Weathered bamboo. Low-poly, blocky, modular; simple readable silhouette.
